name: Analytics Mid-Course Feedback
description: We're halfway through the Analytics course! Take a few minutes to share how it's going. Your honest feedback helps us improve lectures, labs, and learning games.
thankYouMessage: Your responses will help shape the rest of the course. Every piece of feedback matters — enjoy the rest of your study session!

questions.text: How would you rate the course pace?
questions.subtitle: Think about how quickly new topics are introduced.
Where does the course fall on the difficulty spectrum?

questions.text: How difficult do you think your peers find the course?
questions.subtitle: Your best guess — how hard is this course for the average student?

questions.text: Which topics have been most useful so far?
questions.subtitle: Pick your top 2.

questions.text: How would you rate the depth of topic coverage?
questions.subtitle: Are topics covered with enough detail?

questions.text: Rank these learning activities from most to least effective
questions.subtitle: Drag to reorder. #1 = most effective for your learning.

questions.text: How do you feel about the course overall?
questions.subtitle: Pick the emoji that best matches your experience.

questions.text: Should AI tools be allowed on the take-home exam?
questions.subtitle: e.g. LLM chat assistants, code copilots, etc.

questions.text: What's the best thing about the course so far?
questions.subtitle: What's working well for you?
questions.placeholder: The thing I enjoy most is...

questions.text: What would you most like to see improved?
questions.subtitle: Any suggestions are welcome.

questions.text: Anything else you'd like to share?
questions.subtitle: Final thoughts, questions, or shout-outs.
